title: Groan of Arc: 1348 Ex Voto Demo Fails Miserably Modernity Strikes Again!
description:
A few weeks ago the studio behind 1348 ex Voto, Sedleo, joined in the failed cancellation attempt on the team behind Knight's Path. Simply because the studio had their own vision and didn't want to insert identity politics into their game. Well now Seldleo have put out a demo for 1348 and it's not very good at all and barely got any players to give it a try. Whoopsie!
